## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Keep the scope focused. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused scope — one logical change
- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A, explained above)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `node scripts/verify-pack.mjs` passes (when packaging/`files` could be affected)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / CHANGELOG) when behavior or usage changed
- [ ] No secrets or generated state (`.env`, `.techybara/`, tarballs, `dist/`) committed
- [ ] Protected-path and privacy behavior considered (no file contents stored or displayed)

<!-- The `ci-gate` check (full OS/Node matrix + package verification) must pass before merge. -->
